description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/pages/hugo:0.26. Add a pages job that runs in the default test stage, executes the command 'hugo', stores the generated 'public' directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch (only) to publish the site via GitLab Pages. Add a test job that also runs in the default test stage, runs 'hugo' on all branches except master (except), and has no artifacts.
